units.source_text: 1 保險財務儲備反映對法國保險業務採⽤其他全⾯收益選項的影響。⽀持該等保單的相關資產均以按公允值計入其他全⾯收益的⽅式計量。根據此選項，只有符合相
units.translation_target_text: 1 Insurance financial reserves reflect the impact of the adoption of other comprehensive income options for the French insurance business. The underlying assets supporting these policies are measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. According to this option, only the corresponding
units.translation_en: 1 Insurance financial reserves reflect the impact of the adoption of other comprehensive income options for the French insurance business. The underlying assets supporting these policies are measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. According to this option, only the corresponding

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Insurance financial reserves reflect the impact of the adoption of other comprehensive income options for the French insurance business. The underlying assets supporting these policies are measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. According to this option, only the corresponding

units.source_text: 關項⽬於損益賬中已確認收益或⽀出的⾦額，⽅會計入財務收益或⽀出，從⽽消除收益表會計錯配。該等保單餘下的財務收益或⽀出⾦額於其他全⾯收益中確認。
units.translation_target_text: Only the amount of income or expenses that have been recognized in the profit and loss account for the relevant items will be included in the financial income or expenses, thereby eliminating accounting mismatches in the income statement. The remaining financial income or expense amounts from these policies are recognized in other comprehensive income.
units.translation_en: Only the amount of income or expenses that have been recognized in the profit and loss account for the relevant items will be included in the financial income or expenses, thereby eliminating accounting mismatches in the income statement. The remaining financial income or expense amounts from these policies are recognized in other comprehensive income.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Only the amount of income or expenses that have been recognized in the profit and loss account for the relevant items will be included in the financial income or expenses, thereby eliminating accounting mismatches in the income statement. The remaining financial income or expense amounts from these policies are recognized in other comprehensive income.

units.source_text: 2025年12⽉31⽇，整項結餘在完成出售法國保險業務後重新分類⾄收益表。
units.translation_target_text: On December 31, 2025, the entire balance was reclassified to the income statement upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business.
units.translation_en: On December 31, 2025, the entire balance was reclassified to the income statement upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: On December 31, 2025, the entire balance was reclassified to the income statement upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business.

units.source_text: 2 包括在完成出售法國零售銀⾏業務後撥回的15億美元公允值虧損。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Includes a reversal of $1.5 billion in fair value losses following the completion of the sale of the French retail banking business.
units.translation_en: 2 Includes a reversal of $1.5 billion in fair value losses following the completion of the sale of the French retail banking business.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Includes a reversal of $1.5 billion in fair value losses following the completion of the sale of the French retail banking business.

units.source_text: 3 包括因集團於交通銀⾏的持股被攤薄導致撥回的2億美元匯兌儲備虧損。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Including the reversal of US$200 million in exchange reserve losses due to the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications.
units.translation_en: 3 Including the reversal of US$200 million in exchange reserve losses due to the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Including the reversal of US$200 million in exchange reserve losses due to the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications.

units.source_text: 4 包括完成出售法國保險業務後重新分類的7億美元保險財務收益以及重新分類的7億美元公允值虧損。
units.translation_target_text: 4 Includes US$700 million of insurance finance gains reclassified upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business and US$700 million of reclassified fair value losses.
units.translation_en: 4 Includes US$700 million of insurance finance gains reclassified upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business and US$700 million of reclassified fair value losses.

layout_variants.display_en: 4 Includes US$700 million of insurance finance gains reclassified upon completion of the sale of the French insurance business and US$700 million of reclassified fair value losses.

units.source_text: 5 繼2025年5⽉2⽇舉⾏的滙豐控股股東周年⼤會批准後，英格蘭及威爾斯⾼等法院於2025年6⽉24⽇確認註銷滙豐控股股份溢價賬的賬上結餘148億美元，以及資
units.translation_target_text: 5 Following the approval of the HSBC Holdings annual general meeting held on May 2, 2025, the High Court of England and Wales confirmed on June 24, 2025 that the balance of the HSBC Holdings share premium account was written off at US$14.8 billion, as well as the
units.translation_en: 5 Following the approval of the HSBC Holdings annual general meeting held on May 2, 2025, the High Court of England and Wales confirmed on June 24, 2025 that the balance of the HSBC Holdings share premium account was written off at US$14.8 billion, as well as the

units.source_text: 本贖回儲備的賬上結餘18億美元（「資本削減」）。確認資本削減的法院命令於2025年7⽉10⽇在英國公司註冊處予以登記，導致總計共166億美元重新分類⾄保
units.translation_target_text: The Redemption Reserve has an on-book balance of US$1.8 billion (the "Capital Reduction"). The court order confirming the capital reduction was registered with the UK Companies House on 10 July 2025, resulting in a total of US$16.6 billion being reclassified to guaranteed capital.
units.translation_en: The Redemption Reserve has an on-book balance of US$1.8 billion (the "Capital Reduction"). The court order confirming the capital reduction was registered with the UK Companies House on 10 July 2025, resulting in a total of US$16.6 billion being reclassified to guaranteed capital.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The Redemption Reserve has an on-book balance of US$1.8 billion (the "Capital Reduction"). The court order confirming the capital reduction was registered with the UK Companies House on 10 July 2025, resulting in a total of US$16.6 billion being reclassified to guaranteed capital.

units.source_text: 留盈利，對各類股東權益總額概無影響。

units.source_text: 6 滙豐控股於2025年2⽉發⾏15億美元6.95厘或有可轉換證券，於2025年3⽉發⾏8億新加坡元5厘或有可轉換證券，以及於2025年6⽉發⾏20億美元7.05厘或有可轉
units.translation_target_text: 6 HSBC Holdings issued US$1.5 billion of 6.95% contingent convertible securities in February 2025, issued S$800 million of 5% contingent convertible securities in March 2025, and issued US$2 billion of 7.05% contingent convertible securities in June 2025.

units.source_text: 9 滙豐控股年內宣布進⾏以下股份回購：於2025年2⽉宣布回購最多達20億美元股份，並於2025年4⽉完成；於2025年5⽉宣布回購最多30億美元股份，並於2025
units.translation_target_text: 9 HSBC Holdings announced the following share repurchases during the year: it announced the repurchase of up to US$2 billion of shares in February 2025 and completed it in April 2025; it announced the repurchase of up to US$3 billion of shares in May 2025 and completed it in 2025.
units.translation_en: 9 HSBC Holdings announced the following share repurchases during the year: it announced the repurchase of up to US$2 billion of shares in February 2025 and completed it in April 2025; it announced the repurchase of up to US$3 billion of shares in May 2025 and completed it in 2025.

units.source_text: 年7⽉完成；以及於2025年7⽉宣布回購最多30億美元股份，並於2025年10⽉完成。
units.translation_target_text: Completed in July 2025; and announced in July 2025 to repurchase shares of up to US$3 billion, to be completed in October 2025.
